description: Sources should be institutional-grade, not blogs or wikis
grading_notes: Acceptable sources include BloombergNEF, McKinsey, BCG, IDC, Gartner, SEC filings, company annual reports, Reuters, Bloomberg. Blogs, Wikipedia, and unverifiable sources are not acceptable.

description: Financial data must come from official filings or established data providers
grading_notes: Revenue, margins, and valuation data should cite 10-K filings, annual reports, Bloomberg Terminal, Refinitiv, or FactSet. Market data should cite BNEF, IEA, IRENA, or Wood Mackenzie.

description: Market sizing sources must be from recognised research firms
grading_notes: TAM and CAGR estimates should come from Gartner, IDC, Grand View Research, MarketsandMarkets, Precedence Research, or similar established research firms. Unattributed estimates are not acceptable.
